expected_actions: Verify external interference source
Review recent radio parameter changes
Adjust PCI tilt or power if needed
Monitor SINR and handover success rate after action
Escalate backhaul link alarm to transport team
Check interface optical power and physical link
Restore N2 path and verify cell availability
Monitor packet loss after restoration

ground_truth: PCI collision between Cell-31 and Cell-32
expected_actions: Audit PCI and neighbor relation configuration
Assign non-conflicting PCI to one affected cell
Validate handover success rate and radio link failure rate
Dispatch field team to inspect RRU power module
Replace or restore power module
Verify cell availability after RRU recovery
Check SMF to policy database latency
Fail over policy database endpoint if timeout persists
Retry PDU session setup after dependency recovery
Confirm AMF overload and signaling source
Scale AMF capacity or shift traffic
Validate registration success rate after load relief
Confirm UPF worker CPU and queue drops
Shift traffic or scale UPF capacity
Validate throughput and drop rate after traffic relief
Verify DNS resolver health and query failures
Fail over to standby resolver
Validate NF service discovery latency and DNS success rate
Check optical RX power and CRC error trend
Dispatch fiber inspection or clean connector
Validate packet loss and optical power after repair

ground_truth: Router interface admin down after change
expected_actions: Review latest router commit
Restore interface admin state if change was unintended
Validate traffic and link state after rollback

ground_truth: BGP neighbor instability due to MTU mismatch
expected_actions: Compare MTU on both BGP peering interfaces
Align MTU configuration or path MTU
Validate BGP stability and route withdrawals
Confirm utilization and queue drops
Shift traffic or apply temporary QoS relief
Validate latency and drop rate after congestion relief
